meanings.tzolkin.daysign.imix: Imix signals primal beginnings, nurturing instincts and the fertile waters from which new ventures emerge.
meanings.tzolkin.daysign.ik: Ik' carries the breath of spirit and the wind of change, inviting communication, inspiration and renewed vitality.
meanings.tzolkin.daysign.akbal: Ak'b'al draws you into the darkened house of dreams, intuition and the inner search for hidden truth.
meanings.tzolkin.daysign.kan: K'an embodies ripening seed and growing abundance, promising fertility, knowledge and the steady maturing of potential.
meanings.tzolkin.daysign.chikchan: Chikchan stirs the serpent's life-force, awakening instinct, vitality and powerful spiritual energy rising within.
meanings.tzolkin.daysign.kimi: Kimi speaks of death and release, marking transformation, letting go and graceful passage between cycles.
meanings.tzolkin.daysign.manik: Manik' offers the healing, grasping hand, calling for cooperation, stewardship and harmony with all living things.
meanings.tzolkin.daysign.lamat: Lamat shines as the star of abundance and harmony, scattering seeds of beauty, fertility and new growth.
meanings.tzolkin.daysign.muluk: Muluk flows with the offering of water and emotion, awakening memory, gratitude and the call to the heart.
meanings.tzolkin.daysign.ok: Ok embodies faithful companionship, loyalty and guidance, walking beside you with devotion through life's journey.
meanings.tzolkin.daysign.chuwen: Chuwen weaves the artist's playful thread, inviting creativity, craft and the joyful spinning of time.
meanings.tzolkin.daysign.eb: Eb marks the road of life and human destiny, encouraging service, humility and steady progress along your path.
meanings.tzolkin.daysign.ben: B'en raises the upright reed of authority, championing principle, growth and the courageous defence of home and ideals.
meanings.tzolkin.daysign.ix: Ix carries the jaguar's quiet strength, drawing on instinct, magic and a deep bond with the earth.
meanings.tzolkin.daysign.men: Men soars as the eagle of vision, lifting the mind to higher perspective, ambition and far-reaching aspiration.
meanings.tzolkin.daysign.kib: Kib' kindles the wisdom of the ancestors, urging reflection, forgiveness and gratitude for guidance received.
meanings.tzolkin.daysign.kaban: Kab'an pulses with the movement of earth and thought, sparking intelligence, synchronicity and grounded insight.
meanings.tzolkin.daysign.etznab: Etz'nab' gleams as the obsidian blade, cutting through illusion with truth, clarity and decisive discernment.
meanings.tzolkin.daysign.kawak: Kawak gathers the storm's renewing power, heralding upheaval, cleansing and the dawning of fresh awakening.
meanings.tzolkin.daysign.ajaw: Ajaw radiates the lord of the sun, expressing illumination, fulfilment and the flowering of higher purpose.
